title: Office Chat, Mentions & Reactions
changes: Added direct and group office chat with unread indicators and live updates.
Added @mentions, @All mentions, message reactions, stickers, and emoji support.
Added online status indicators for user avatars across the workspace.
Added date boundaries in chat conversations for Today, Yesterday, and older message dates.

title: Audit Logs & Workspace Transparency
changes: Added audit logs for retainers, special projects, clients, transmittals, meetings, and library manuals.
Added expandable audit log details showing only changed fields for cleaner review.
Added Admin Console audit log viewing with filters for audit review.
Improved filing history labels by renaming Historical Audit Trail to Previous Filings.

title: MongoDB Migration, Faster Pages & UI Refresh
changes: Migrated core app data from Google Sheets to MongoDB while keeping Google Drive uploads unchanged.
Improved page performance with optimized data loading, pagination, and faster navigation.
Redesigned Retainers, Special Projects, Clients, Operations, Settings, Reports, and Dashboard views.
Added the Library section for service manuals, requirements, templates, and office guidance.
